title: Add local ty and ruff dev tooling
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:

The project's mise typecheck task should use the repo-managed ty installation instead of uvx, and the lockfile should include the local development tooling needed for checks.

Update the project configuration to add ty and ruff to the dev dependency group, switch the mise typecheck task to use the project environment, and refresh uv.lock accordingly.
